result.output_text:
1. Files changed

- [src/components/orchestration/orchestration-hub.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/orchestration-page-cleanup/src/components/orchestration/orchestration-hub.tsx): renamed the embedded Prefect tab to `Embedded UI` and tightened the page intro copy around generic orchestration language.
- [src/components/orchestration/overnight-oats-panel.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/orchestration-page-cleanup/src/components/orchestration/overnight-oats-panel.tsx): removed the redundant Prefect summary/health widgets and the separate `Work pools` / `Workers` panels, leaving the run/deployment details intact.
- [src/components/orchestration/tabs.test.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/orchestration-page-cleanup/src/components/orchestration/tabs.test.ts): added a regression test that guards the simplified tab label and the removal of the extra health widgets.

2. Validation commands run and outcomes

- `node --import tsx --test src/components/orchestration/tabs.test.ts`: passed
- `env npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm run lint`: passed

3. Remaining risks or follow-ups

- The new regression check in [tabs.test.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/orchestration-page-cleanup/src/components/orchestration/tabs.test.ts) is source-based rather than a rendered component test, so it protects the intended copy/structure but not runtime tab behavior.
- The worktree already had an unrelated modification in [src/components/orchestration/tabs.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/orchestration-page-cleanup/src/components/orchestration/tabs.ts) before this task.
- Lint created `.cache/`, which is untracked output from the validation run.
